options.a: uses circular polarisation in order to reduce echoes of heavy showers.
options.b: may receive no reflections from a thunderstorm in an area behind a heavy rain shower.
options.c: has a second transmitter working on a lower frequency in order to penetrate rain showers.
options.d: has the possibility to detect clear air turbulence behind a thunder storm by measuring phase differences caused by the Doppler effect.
